miserable.
18. Should the Moon be in 5th, the native will be timid in disposition, will earn learning, clothes and
food, will have many sons and friends, be a scholar and be passionate.
19. If the Moon be in 6th, the native will suffer stomachial diseases. If it be the weak Moon, he will
be short-lived.
20. If the Moon is in 7th, the native will be amiable, happy, will possess a good physique and be
sensuously disposed. If the weak Moon is in 7th, the native will be pitiable and weak.
21. If the Moon is in 8th, the native will be very intelligent, very splendourous and will suffer from
diseases. If the Moon be weak, he will be short-lived.
22. If the Moon is in 9th, the native will be devoted to divine and paternal assignments, will be
endowed with happiness, wealth, intelligence and sons and will attract the fair sex.
